title: T-044 — Server Action buildD365/export (optional D365 integration + MFA + V01-V08/V18 pre-flight)
prompt:
# T-044 — buildD365 single-click action

PRD: docs/prd/01-NPD-PRD.md §10.6, §2.3 (MFA), §12 V04/V07
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
buildD365(productCode, mfaToken) Server Action: enforces d365_builder.execute permission, MFA verification, runs V01-V08 + V18 pre-flight (must pass V01-V06 + V07 PASS + V04 no Missing), generates optional D365 export workbook via T-042, persists via T-043, sets fa.built=TRUE, emits fa.built event.

## Implementation contract
New apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/actions/build-d365.ts. Pipeline: 1) RBAC check; 2) verifyMfaToken (TOTP via Clerk or speakeasy); 3) run V01..V08 + V04; 4) build workbook; 5) persistDownloadable; 6) UPDATE product SET built=TRUE; 7) emit fa.built. Single tx for steps 5-7. Returns {downloadUrl, expiresAt}.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/actions/build-d365.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/actions/__tests__/build-d365.test.ts [create]
- packages/auth/src/verify-mfa-token.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given Jane (npd_manager + valid TOTP) and FA passing V01-V07 + V04 no Missing, when buildD365 runs, then product.built=TRUE, fa_builder_outputs row exists, fa.built event emitted, downloadUrl returned
2. Given V04 returns Missing for one material, when buildD365 runs, then GateError 'V04_MISSING' thrown without setting built
3. Given user role core_user attempts buildD365, when called, then AuthError thrown

## Test strategy
- RED: 3 tests covering happy path, V04 gate, RBAC denial
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test build-d365'

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip MFA
- Do not commit fa.built before file is persisted
- Do not emit fa.built without successful upload

2026-05-03 override: D365 is optional integration/export/import only, not canonical source of truth; V18 Open High risk is a hard blocker for build/export.

pipeline_inputs.description: Single-click optional D365 export/import integration action chaining RBAC + MFA + V01-V08 + V18 pre-flight + workbook + storage + state transition.
pipeline_inputs.details:
Single-tx commit of file + DB state. MFA verification via TOTP. Returns downloadUrl + expiresAt. D365 output is optional integration/export/import only; Monopilot/NPD Builder remains canonical for WIP + FG + validated BOM/product records. V18 open High risk is a hard build/export blocker.

Additional acceptance detail preserved from compressed AC list:
- Given user role core_user attempts buildD365, when called, then AuthError thrown
- UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.
out_of_scope: Do not implement wizard flow here (T-046)
Do not implement V04 cache refresh (T-064)
acceptance_criteria: Given Jane with valid TOTP and FA passing V01-V08 + V18 no Open High risk + V04 no Missing, when buildD365 runs, then product.built=TRUE, fa_builder_outputs row exists, fa.built event emitted, downloadUrl returned D365 is treated as optional export output, not canonical record creation.
Given V04 returns Missing for one material, when buildD365 runs, then GateError 'V04_MISSING' thrown without setting built
Given V18 returns an Open High risk, when buildD365/export runs, then GateError 'V18_HIGH_RISK_OPEN' is thrown without setting built or exporting.

Given the task is closed out, when reviewers inspect the task evidence, then these additional requirements are proven together: Given user role core_user attempts buildD365, when called, then AuthError thrown; UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.
test_strategy: RED: 3 tests covering happy path, V04 gate, RBAC denial before action exists
For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.
risk_red_lines: Do not commit fa.built before file persisted
Do not emit fa.built without successful upload
Do not treat D365 as source of truth; it is optional integration/export/import only.
Do not allow any build/export path when V18 has an Open High risk; V18 is a hard built-blocker.
